description: As the Data Manager, configure a new 'Donor' analytical dimension to aggregate project-level data. Create Category Options for 'Project Alpha', 'Project Beta', 'Project Gamma', and 'Project Delta', then map them to Category Option Groups 'Donor: Global Fund' (containing Alpha and Beta) and 'Donor: USAID' (containing Gamma and Delta). Organize these into a Category Option Group Set named 'Donor Funding Source' enabled as a 'Data dimension'. Create and save a Pivot Table named 'Donor Funding Analysis 2024' that displays 'ANC 1st visit' data by 'Organisation unit' and the 'Donor Funding Source' dimension.
